contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Stripe → TBM end-to-end: fee fetch in Edgar + ledger routing GAS + transparency explorer alignment
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1053
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/6
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/7
  
  Details:
  Full Stripe-donation-to-transparency-dashboard loop now working end-to-end
  through the local-test path. Closed the chain after the prior Edgar
  ledger-only patch (sentiment_importer#1052) by adding fee fetching,
  ledger fee-row propagation, schema alignment between routing GAS and the
  transparency explorer, and a series of UX corrections from live testing.
  
  Shipped:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer#1053 — Stripe fee fetch at webhook
     time. MetaCheckoutOrderSyncWorker now does the three-hop traversal
     (PaymentIntent → latest_charge → balance_transaction → .fee) and
     passes stripe_fee_cents through MetaCheckoutOrderSync to
     Gdrive::StripeCheckoutLog which writes (cents/100).round(2) to a new
     col L "Stripe Transaction Fee" (and ensures the col L header on first
     run, same pattern as col Q Environment). Deployed via ./deploy.sh.
  
  2. Tokenomics agroverse_shop_checkout Apps Script (clasp_mirror
     15qbfLN3...) routeStripeCheckoutPurchasesToLedgers — 9 iterations to
     match the actual managed-ledger schema:
     - v6/v7/v8: shipped the function + restored webapp manifest block
       (was missing; broke every prior /exec call until added)
     - v9: Entity="Stripe Customer" (failed Sheet validation)
     - v10: Entity=FUND_HANDLER ("Gary Teh") + session id in Description
       for at-a-glance dedup + Transactions-tab dedup pre-check so a
       row cant double-write even when audit-tab col P is cleared
     - v11: ISO date (yyyy-MM-dd) so the explorer Date.parse works; was
       yyyyMMdd and rendered "Invalid Date" everywhere
     - v12: Type=stripe_donation (interim attempt to satisfy explorer)
     - v13: Type=Assets to match Sheet accounting-category convention
       (Assets / Liabilities / Equity); Stripe-event sub-type lives in
       Description via the session-id prefix
     - v14: Description leads with the cs_test_/cs_live_ session id for
       prominent viewer recognition; writes a second negative-amount
       Type=Assets fee row to the managed-ledger Transactions tab when
       audit col L has a positive fee value (mirrors Flow 3 SaaS pattern
       of paired gross + fee rows). All deployments via clasp
       push + clasp version + clasp deploy --deploymentId.
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia#6 — Explorer table trim. Drops per-row
     Fees + Net columns (no longer meaningful since fees arrive as their
     own negative-amount rows); single signed Amount column instead;
     renderSummary detection switched from tx.type keyword filter to
     description-keyword + amount-sign, since Type is now "Assets" for
     every managed-ledger row; positive = Inflow, negative + "fee" in
     desc = Fee, negative + BRL/"pix" = Pix outbound.
  
  4. TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia#7 — Robust ISO date parse so Safari's
     stricter Date constructor doesn't return Invalid Date on bare-date
     strings; description wraps within max-width 420px with break-all so
     long Stripe session ids don't blow out the column.
  
  5. Three treasury-cache TBM.json publishes via
     snapshot_managed_ledgers.py --ledger TBM.
  
  End-to-end verification with stripe listen --forward-to deployed Edgar:
  local capoeira donate → Stripe test checkout → webhook → 200 from
  Edgar → Sidekiq worker writes audit row with cols A-I + col L (fee) +
  col Q (SANDBOX) → manual doGet to routing GAS → TBM Transactions
  gets a +Assets donation row and a -Assets fee row, both with
  session-id-prefixed Description → snapshot publishes TBM.json →
  https://tribomirimbahia.truesight.me/ now shows Total Inflow $50.00,
  Total Fees $1.75, two rows with correct dates and full descriptions.
  
  Last DAO entry covered sentiment_importer#1052 (channel gate + Wix
  decoupling + mode-aware key) but no fee path and no GAS routing
  function. This entry closes those gaps.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

My Digital Signature:

Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
